asr.label: Qwen3-ASR vLLM
asr.description: Speech recognition service, started by qwen-asr-serve.
asr.command: env OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 conda run --no-capture-output -n qwen3-asr qwen-asr-serve "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/Qwen3-ASR-0.6B" --served-model-name qwen3-asr --gpu-memory-utilization 0.25 --max-model-len 1024 --max-num-seqs 1 --enforce-eager --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001

llm.label: llama.cpp Qwen3.5
llm.description: OpenAI-compatible llama.cpp server for the chat model.

tts.label: CosyVoice3 TTS
tts.description: Trained CosyVoice3 API with internal vLLM acceleration.
